title: Fury-class starfighter

{{Quote|Ready your fighters for their run, horizon approach. We wait for Roan Fel to appear…and then they all die.|[[Darth Talon]] to [[Darth Nihl]] on [[Vendaxa/Legends|Vendaxa]]|<ref name="SWL6:BP5">[[Legacy (2006) 6|''Legacy'' (2006) 6]]</ref>}}
The '''''Fury''-class starfighter''', also known as '''Sith Fury''', was a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] first used by the [[One Sith]] around [[130 ABY]]. Its design was based on the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]] [[Cutlass-9 patrol fighter]].<ref name="LECG" />

==Characteristics==
[[File:Sith_fighter_Legacy_0.jpg|thumb|left|180px|Rear view of a [[One Sith|Sith]] [[Starfighter/Legends|fighter]].]]

These fighters appeared similar to the [[Predator-class fighter|''Predator''-class fighters]] used by [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] of the [[Fel Empire]], with two wings curving out from the main hull. These vessels were powered by three [[Ion engine/Legends|ion drives]], the largest of which was located under the hull. They were armed with dual [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]], fitted underneath the fighter's nose on both sides<ref name="SWL6:BP5" /> as well as on the wingtips. The cockpit was more spacious than most starfighters, which made the fighter comfortable for long journeys.<ref name="LECG" />

The fighter also made use of an [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droid]].<ref name="Mons" />

==History==
''Fury''-class fighters were produced in Sith metalworks and first deployed in combat towards the end of the [[Sith–Imperial War]].<ref name="SWL0½">[[Star Wars: Legacy (2006) 0½|''Star Wars: Legacy'' (2006) 0½]]</ref>

[[File:FuryCrossfire-LECG.png|thumb|left|200px|A ''Fury''-class starfighter fires on a CF9 Crossfire starfighter.]]
In [[137 ABY]], [[Darth Talon]] used one of these starfighters to journey from [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] to [[Socorro/Legends|Socorro]] on her mission to capture [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Marasiah Fel]].<ref name="SWL2:BP2">[[Legacy (2006) 2|''Legacy'' (2006) 2]]</ref> [[Darth Nihl]] and his ground forces later used Sith fighters to pursue two ''Predator'' fighters, one of which was thought to carry former [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Roan Fel]]. The enemy fighters were shot down, and Nihl's forces joined Talon groundside to confront Marasiah and her protectors.<ref name="SWL6:BP5" /> The Sith Lords [[Darth Kruhl]] and [[Darth Wyyrlok (III)|Darth Wyyrlok]] also used a ''Fury''-class fighter when on a mission.<ref name="SWL13:RTD">[[Legacy (2006) 13|''Legacy'' (2006) 13]]</ref><ref name="SWL27:ITC">[[Legacy (2006) 27|''Legacy'' (2006) 27]]</ref>

A number of Sith Fury pilots were stationed on the ''[[War Hammer]]'' for [[Operation: Thunderstroke]] where they went into competition with members of the Imperial [[1st Imperial Center Core Defense Squadron|Skull Squadron]].
